change_notes: Set is_organisation to true; name identifies a collective/brotherhood organisation
Removed 'von' from name_particles — 'von' does not appear to be a legitimate particle for this English name; likely a tagging error
Moved 'Pater' from given_names to name_prefix as it is a religious title (Father); 'Bonifatius' retained as family_name (monastic name)
Moved 'Late Duke of' from name_particles to name_suffix as it is a title/honorific suffix, not a connective particle
Extracted 'van Bee' from family_name to name_particles; family_name corrected to 'Bontjes'
Separated 'Freiherr' (noble title/suffix) from 'von' (particle); 'Freiherr' moved to name_suffix, 'von' retained in name_particles
Set is_organisation to true; name clearly identifies a library/institution

Removed 'di' from name_particles — 'di' is part of Boccaccio's patronymic (Giovanni di Boccaccio) but 'Boccaccio' is used as the family name without a particle; 'di' does not function as a connective particle in this context
Removed 'von den' from name_particles as there is no evidence this particle belongs to the name 'Bob Born'
Moved 'der Jüngere' from name_particles to name_suffix as it is a generational epithet, not a connective particle
Removed erroneous 'von' particle; Bredekamp is not a particle-bearing name
Moved 'der Ältere' from name_particles to name_suffix — it is an epithet/distinguishing suffix, not a connective particle between family name and given name
